plan_type_rationale: Single localized fix — 2 lines added to orchestrator.ts header-stamp loop

tasks.description: In orchestrator.ts header-stamp loop, add: if (headerFact.capability !== undefined) elem.capability = headerFact.capability; if (headerFact.layer !== undefined) elem.layer = headerFact.layer;
Run header-fact-shape.test.ts — assert elem.layer === 'utility' and elem.capability === 'foo-bar' for elements from a file with those header tags
Commit the fix with message: fix(orchestrator): propagate capability/layer from headerFact into element fields

acceptance_criteria: After fix: elements from files with @capability/@layer in their semantic headers have those fields populated in element data
